title: The Vibe Coding Bible Manifest

retrieval.rule: When a retrieved topic reaches VCB:STOP_RETRIEVAL, do not continue scanning unless the task explicitly requires related topics.

required_topic_sections: ## 2. For the AI Coach: How to Teach This to Your Human

topic_namespace_policy.rule: Use only declared topic roots in indexes and frontmatter. Directories may be plural; topic ID namespaces are canonical and stable.

vcb.codex.purpose: Codex product surfaces, features, configuration, and official behavior anchors

vcb.workflow.purpose: implementation, debugging, review, testing, and delivery workflows

vcb.safety.purpose: sandboxing, permissions, secrets, security review, prompt injection, and production red lines

vcb.constraints.purpose: budget, attention, project phase, operating mode, and cost constraints

vcb.field.purpose: labeled unofficial or user-discovered field practices

vcb.failure.purpose: Codex/AI-building failure modes and model failure biases

non_topic_namespaces.vcb.synthesis: non-topic maintainer synthesis records used as evidence_basis/source_kind, not retrievable topic routes

rules: Use vcb.workflow.* for workflow topics, not a separate review/testing/git/frontend namespace unless the manifest is changed and editor-approved.
Use vcb.safety.* for secrets/security/production-red-line topics unless a future security root is explicitly added.
Use vcb.shortcut.* for individual shortcut cards; use vcb.register.shortcuts for the register.
Indexes must route to canonical IDs, not redirect IDs.
Use vcb.synthesis.* only for maintainer synthesis records; do not route indexes to it as authored topic content and do not treat it as an evidence level.

alias_deprecation_policy.rule: Redirect IDs may remain in manifest and deprecation/register records, but active retrieval surfaces must prefer the canonical active replacement. If a planned alias is shown in a semantic route, the active replacement must appear first.
alias_deprecation_policy.shortcut_alias_scope: shortcut redirects whose source and target both start with vcb.shortcut and whose target is an authored active shortcut card

evidence_basis_fields.evidence_basis: Optional field for maintainer synthesis basis; not an evidence level.
evidence_basis_fields.source_kind: Optional field to identify official docs plus synthesis, maintainer synthesis, community report, expert report, local reproduction, or speculation.

source_handling.product_pricing_and_limits: official vendor sources and dated pricing snapshots only
source_handling.community_practices: label E3/E4/E5 and include reproducibility caveats
source_handling.internal_maintainer_synthesis: not an evidence level; use evidence_basis/source_kind and cite component sources where available
source_handling.e3_expert_report: named expert, blog, course, talk, or public practitioner only
source_handling.external_source_id_roots: SOURCE_REGISTER may include openai, git, github, aws, w3c, owasp, playwright, npm, openssf, and similar vendor/standards roots for evidence records only; indexes must not route to these as VCB topics.

scope: blocked until editor scopes post-release maintenance, errata, pricing-refresh, source-refresh, or content-expansion work

artifact_hygiene.policy: one timestamped authoritative final-release zip only
artifact_hygiene.tree_txt_policy: TREE.txt is generated/non-canonical inventory support. manifest.json remains the machine-readable source map.
do_not_submit_prior_artifacts: older Chunk 0 or Chunk 1 zip packages
unversioned manifest/report files from prior submissions
any duplicate loose copy that can diverge from the authoritative zip
artifact_hygiene.zip_checksum_policy: final zip SHA-256 is external to the source tree; verify against author submission checksum and, when supplied, the external .sha256 sidecar

live_repository_inventory.package_comparison: live repository inventory may exceed the historical Final Release 1 zip without mutating that package record

historical_final_release_package.policy: one timestamped authoritative final-release zip only
historical_final_release_package.source_tree_status: frozen package record; current live repository counts are tracked in manifest.live_repository_inventory

namespace_policy.rule: Use only declared topic roots in indexes and frontmatter. Directories may be plural; topic ID namespaces are canonical and stable.

scope: triage Issue #23 as a scoped post-release usage insight
allow exactly one candidate field-practice/workflow-pattern card for Issue #23
preserve historical Final Release 1 package metadata
update live routing, field-practice registers, LLM maps, source records, manifest inventory, and TREE.txt for the Issue #23 candidate card
no field-practice promotions or reproduction claims

package.policy: one timestamped authoritative final-release zip only
package.source_tree_status: frozen package record; current live repository counts are tracked in manifest.live_repository_inventory

live_repository_inventory.package_comparison: live repository inventory may exceed the historical Final Release 1 zip without mutating that package record

validation_expectations.current_chunk_checks: Chunk 45 post-release Issue #23 usage-insight triage, candidate-only field-practice evidence labeling, live inventory/register consistency, validator output, docs build output, historical Final Release 1 package preservation, and no tool/shortcut/pricing/narrative expansion scope guardrails.
validation_expectations.current_chunk_scope_boundaries: Chunk 45 boundary: scoped post-release Issue #23 usage-insight triage. Allows exactly one candidate field-practice/workflow-pattern card for Issue #23 with E4 evidence; No field-practice promotion or reproduction claim, No new tool cards, No shortcut cards, No pricing snapshots, No broad workflow expansion, No broad security/secrets expansion, No broad tool-catalog expansion, No source-map migration, and No narrative chapters.

explicit_exclusions: one-card-per-cloud-service expansion for every AWS/GCP/Azure service until scoped by editor
tool_catalog_coverage_gap_audit.coverage_statement: Active tool cards are curated and not exhaustive; deferred/planned rows prevent false completeness.

release_candidate_gaps: Release Candidate 1 revision 2 was approved for packaging-only final release; Final Release 1 is produced in Chunk 44.
Non-OpenAI pricing snapshots remain deferred, so exact cross-vendor cost guidance is excluded from the final release.
Tool coverage is explicit but curated, not exhaustive; 23 deferred/planned ecosystem IDs remain.
Field-practice cards remain candidate-only; none are reproduced, promoted, retired, or deprecated.
Changelog chronological ordering follows the documented review-trail convention rather than strict newest-first normalization.

release_candidate_scope_disposition_clea.release_candidate_allowed_next_condition: release candidate gate approved; Final Release 1 package produced in Chunk 44

disposition_matrix.notes: Chunk 43 produced Release Candidate 1 as a packaging-only artifact; final release still requires editor review.
Release can proceed only if it explicitly excludes exact cross-vendor pricing and stable prose avoids exact non-OpenAI prices, quotas, credits, and plan limits.
TOOL_REGISTER records 52 active cards and 23 deferred/planned ecosystem IDs; one-card-per-cloud-service expansion remains excluded until scoped.
All nine field-practice retrieval cards remain candidate and E4_COMMUNITY_FIELD_REPORT.
CHANGELOG documents current/recent entries first and older historical entries preserving original authoring/revision order.

documented_limitations: exact non-OpenAI pricing snapshots remain deferred
tool catalog is curated rather than exhaustive: 52 active tool cards and 23 deferred/planned ecosystem IDs
all nine field-practice retrieval cards remain candidate-only
changelog ordering follows the documented review-trail convention
